Overrides.Override: 10% reduced Attributes 40% increased Global Defences Limited to 1 Runegraft of the Fortress

Items.Item: Rarity: UNIQUE Aegis Aurora Champion Kite Shield Armour: 1446 ArmourBasePercentile: 0.8125 Energy Shield: 294 EnergyShieldBasePercentile: 0.8333 Unique ID: 3214a1e839efd96dc464ef7cbe3b90be9e706df2fa7a132029bbb8477623a84e Item Level: 85 Quality: 20 Sockets: B-B-R LevelReq: 62 Implicits: 1 +4% Chance to Block 400% increased Armour and Energy Shield +10% to all Elemental Resistances +5% to maximum Cold Resistance +6% Chance to Block Recover Energy Shield equal to 2% of Armour when you Block 12% increased Elemental Damage with Attack Skills Corrupted
